name: BBX Capital, Inc.
business: BBX Capital, Inc. is a Florida-based diversified holding company whose principal holdings are The Altman Companies, LLC (Altman), BBX Sweet Holdings, LLC, and Renin Holdings, LLC. Altman is primarily engaged in the acquisition, development, and sale of multifamily rental apartment communities, warehouse and logistics facilities, and single-family master-planned housing communities. BBX Sweet Holdings is engaged in the confectionery industry, including IT SUGAR, a specialty candy retailer, and Las Olas Confections and Snacks, a manufacturer and wholesaler of chocolate and other confectionery products. Renin is engaged in the design, manufacture, and distribution of sliding doors, door systems and hardware, and home decor products.
sellsTo: sliding doors and hardware through retail, commercial, and direct installation channels

exposures.sentence: Altman is primarily engaged in the acquisition, development, and sale of multifamily rental apartment communities, warehouse and logistics facilities, and single-family master-planned housing communities primarily located in Florida.

Altman is primarily engaged in the acquisition, development, and sale of multifamily rental apartment communities, warehouse and logistics facilities, and single-family master-planned housing communities primarily located in Florida.

Altman Builders ... primarily performs general contractor services for a majority of the multifamily apartment communities developed by Altman Living and also sometimes performs such services for unaffiliated developers.

IT SUGAR, a specialty candy retailer in over 100 retail locations in the United States and one location in Canada whose products include bulk candy, candy in giant packaging, and licensed and novelty items, and (ii) Las Olas Confections and Snacks, a manufacturer and wholesaler of chocolate and other confectionery products.

Renin is engaged in the design, manufacture, and distribution of sliding doors, door systems and hardware, and home decor products and operates through its headquarters in Canada and manufacturing and distribution facilities in the United States and Canada.

catalysts.event: Decision on possible deregistration of common stock and suspension of reporting obligations
catalysts.sentence: We expect to make a decision regarding the possible deregistration of our common stock during the second quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Substantial completion of Altis Grand Kendall multifamily apartment community
catalysts.sentence: Construction of the community is expected to be substantially completed in early 2025, and delivered units are currently being leased.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of Altis Grand Twin Lakes multifamily apartment community
catalysts.sentence: Altis Grand Twin Lakes ... Under Construction - Expected Completion in 2025.

catalysts.event: First phase lots sale at JX Properties single-family development
catalysts.sentence: Altman currently expects that it will sell the first phase of lots to the homebuilder in 2025.

catalysts.event: IT SUGAR opening seven new retail locations
catalysts.sentence: While IT SUGAR currently has leases to open seven retail locations in the first quarter of 2025, it does not have any further scheduled new store openings beyond March 2025.

catalysts.event: Commencement of construction at Apex Logistics at Lakeland
catalysts.sentence: expect to obtain site plan approval and commence construction in the first half of 2025.

catalysts.sentence: expect to commence construction in the first half of 2025.
